mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly boosting S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns show no statistical significance during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.5 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer demand and lower corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in over 65 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses above 4.5 percent, invalidating the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic expansion, increasing equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 55 percent of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid declines in the industrial production index indicate supply-side bottlenecks and manufacturing contraction, triggering immediate risk-off selling and negative short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Short-term returns remain positive despite industrial production drops, or the signal fails to predict direction in over 50 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation measured by CPI exceeds 7.0 percent, markets price in aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally during CPI readings above 7.0 percent, or the threshold fails to separate positive from negative return periods with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect robust economic activity and rising wage income, supporting corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Payroll growth consistently coincides with negative quarterly equity returns, or the signal predictive power vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where housing starts decline while retail sales rise indicates a shift from durable goods to services consumption, reducing near-term equity volatility and supporting positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The divergence pattern yields negative forward returns in over 60 percent of cases, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production alongside falling unemployment signals capacity utilization approaching maximums, triggering inflation fears and immediate negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Markets reward the capacity utilization signal with positive returns, or the joint indicator fails to predict short-term direction in out-of-sample tests.
